title: Coal and India’s Energy Future
summary: Chikkatur discusses the role that coal power plays in India's growth and proposes a pathway toward cleaner coal consumption.
body: In this presentation, given at the ERG Colloquium at the University of California, Berkeley on October 17th, 2007, Chikkatur discusses the role that coal power plays in India's growth and proposes a pathway toward cleaner coal consumption.
